name: Easy Beef Fajitas
recipeIngredient: 2 Serrano or jalapeno chiles (seeded and minced)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet over medium-high heat, sauté onions and mushrooms in oil and sherry for 10 minutes.
- Cut the steak into 1-1/2-inch strips and add to the skillet. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
- Add the chiles, cumin, coriander, and cilantro, then cook for another 3 minutes, stirring frequently.
2. Warm the tortillas in a toaster oven or conventional oven.
- Arrange bowls of salsa, sliced avocado, and yogurt on a tray.
- Wrap the warmed tortillas in a clean cloth napkin.
- Serve the meat filling from the skillet or in a prewarmed serving dish. Guests can then assemble their own fajitas.
